experiment_9.Task: Build a reusable Galaxy tabular ML workflow for immunotherapy response prediction with internal and external validation.
experiment_9.Prompt: Use Galaxy to build a reusable tabular machine-learning workflow for immunotherapy response prediction. Train on the attached Chowell training set, evaluate on the attached Chowell test set, fetch the MSK1 validation cohort listed in the manifest, evaluate there as well, and report the Chowell and MSK1 accuracies plus the tuning strategy used.
